personal.tagline: Building impactful web applications, solving real-world problems through technology, and continuously improving through coding, projects, and innovation.
personal.bio: Hi, I'm Prathyusha, Computer Science Engineer passionate about software development, full-stack web applications,DevOps tools and problem solving. I enjoy transforming ideas into practical solutions and continuously learning new technologies.
personal.description: With hands-on experience in web development, databases, and problem solving, I have built projects ranging from emergency assistance platforms to AI-powered applications. My interests include Full Stack Development, Software Engineering, and Python Development, and creating technology that delivers meaningful impact.

whatIDo.title: Full Stack Development
whatIDo.description: Building responsive and user-friendly web applications using React, Node.js, Express.js, and databases.

whatIDo.description: Solved 150+ coding problems and continuously improving DSA skills through LeetCode practice.

highlights: Spearheaded cloud infrastructure setup and deployment across Azure and AWS for high availability and scalability
Designed and maintained advanced CI/CD pipelines in Jenkins for code release, configuration generation, and database operations
Architected scalable Kubernetes (EKS) platform on AWS, orchestrating 40+ microservices with automated deployments and rollbacks
Delivered containerized applications using multistage Docker builds, cutting image size by 40%
Built monitoring and alerting stacks with Azure Monitor, Application Insights, and Log Analytics, reducing incident detection time by 60%
Integrated Azure Key Vault with CI/CD pipelines for secure secret management
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to drive DevOps adoption, improving rollout frequency and reducing downtime
Built logic algorithms and managed extensive data using Node.js and React.js, influencing the company's product
Automated tasks with Node.js algorithms, significantly boosting efficiency by 25%
Constructed and deployed REST APIs with Node.js, Express.js, and MySQL
Integrated MERN components (MySQL, Express.js, React, Node.js) to augment product functionality

projects.title: HELP HIVE
projects.description: Developed a responsive emergency assistance platform that helps users quickly access nearby hospitals, police stations, NGOs, and SHE Teams based on their current location. Designed to improve accessibility to critical services during emergencies.Implemented location-based emergency contact retrieval, reducing emergency contact search time by 80% compared to manual searching.

projects.title: Pet Adoption Center
projects.description: Built a pet adoption platform that enables users to browse, adopt, and manage pets through a secure and user-friendly interface. Implemented pet management and adoption workflows capable of handling 100+ pet listings with real-time updates.

projects.title: Food Impact Analyzer
projects.description: Developed an intelligent application that analyzes food choices and provides sustainability insights using AI-driven recommendations. Integrated Flask backend, SQLite database, and machine learning concepts to evaluate environmental impact improving data retrieval efficiency by 30% through optimized queries.
